summary: Tested 35 content rendering assertions (VAL-CONT-001 through VAL-CONT-035). All 35 PASS. Primary evidence: all 6 original books (Martyr, ThreeBelow, Elvis, Familiars, HungerGames, TOG) produce 0 text diffs against Calibre reference EPUBs (394/394 total matching files). Go test suite passes with 0 failures. Code-level verification confirms all content types, element dispatch paths, special features (drop caps, superscripts, annotations, ruby, region magnification), and edge case handling are implemented.
